calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Asset
Off Calendar Jan-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Grabsten for and with Ellouise Patton and Aleta Smith (Petitioners).

Mr. Grabstein reported that he has filed a Response addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes and that Ms. Smith has signed the Joinder which he will e-file this afternoon. The matter was taken under submission pending review of the Response and Joinder.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
